topStories.title: Martyrs’ Day 2026 turns out to be show of political strength for rival Trinamool factions in West Bengal
topStories.summary: Trinamool Congress MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar, who, along with 19 other party Lok Sabha MPs, has merged with the little-known Nationalist Citizens Party of India (NCPI), said the faction would observe Martyrs’ Day at Rajghat

topStories.summary: The police action on one of the largest protests in the national capital in recent years left several people injured

topStories.title: Global Market:  Japan's Nikkei rebounds as bargain buying lifts stocks after sharp weekly selloff
topStories.summary: Japan's Nikkei share average advanced on Tuesday, recovering from last week's steep slide. Investors bought beaten-down stocks after a market holiday, boosting the index. Global sentiment remained cautious due to rising oil prices and inflation concerns. Focus now shifts to upcoming second-quarter earnings from major U.S. technology firms. Analysts noted the gains reflected a technical rebound ahead of key corporate results.

topStories.title: Green Line services of Namma Metro in Bengaluru disrupted for 45 minutes after power breakdown
topStories.summary: BMRCL expressed regret for the inconvenience caused, and thanked commuters for their patience and cooperation

topStories.title: Leave with all your belongings, Mamata tells deserters
topStories.summary: Mamata Banerjee, who is facing one of the biggest challenges of her political life, said those who remain with her will be her “greatest strength”, and she will rebuild the Trinamool Congress with them

topStories.title: Cause for concern? HDFC Bank is lagging ICICI Bank where it matters as investors count Rs 5 lakh crore loss
topStories.summary: HDFC Bank's stock has declined significantly this year, losing considerable investor value. Analysts note a widening operating gap between HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank. Margins are under pressure for HDFC Bank, while loan growth lags peers. ICICI Bank shows stronger earnings, better margins, and faster credit growth. Investors await margin recovery and management stability for HDFC Bank.

topStories.title: TMC MLA Madan Mitra attends Mamata camp's assembly protest days after joining rebel faction
topStories.summary: Clarifying his presence at the protest, Madan Mitra said he had remained there purely as a matter of courtesy after emerging from Ritabrata Banerjee's chamber in the Assembly, and insisted that it did not signify any change in his political position.

topStories.title: Class X batch of 1983 at St. Aloysius High School gifts ₹65 lakh self-sustaining endowment
topStories.summary: The endowment is said to be the first-ever batch-led scholarship endowment of its kind in the 146-year-old institution

topStories.title: UltraTech Cement shares gain 2% after Q1 results. Why Nuvama, other brokerages raised target?
topStories.summary: UltraTech Cement shares rose after the company posted a 17% year-on-year rise in Q1 FY27 consolidated net profit to Rs 2,599 crore and a 16% increase in revenue to Rs 24,648 crore. The stock also gained after multiple brokerages raised their target prices, encouraged by strong earnings and management guidance

topStories.title: Pothundy double murder case: a death penalty verdict with rare focus on rehabilitating victims’ family
topStories.summary: Court directs District Legal Services Authority, Palakkad, to initiate rehabilitation measures for orphaned children of the victims; legal experts say such a specific direction was rare in criminal judgments

topStories.title: Paytm shares gain 3% after Q1 results. What are Goldman Sachs, Citi and CLSA saying?
topStories.summary: Paytm shares rose 2.7% after the fintech firm reported a 79% year-on-year jump in Q1 consolidated net profit to Rs 220 crore. Revenue from operations increased 28% to Rs 2,448 crore, while total income rose 22% to Rs 2,630 crore. Profit before tax climbed to Rs 247 crore, reflecting stronger operating performance both year-on-year and quarter-on-quarter.

topStories.title: AI in skill education instead of third language in select high schools; BEOs instructed to appoint one ‘AI guest teacher’ per school
topStories.summary: The Block Education Officer concerned has been instructed to appoint one ‘AI guest teacher’ per school to teach AI

topStories.title: South Korea’s Kospi jumps 4% after 31% crash from June peak. What’s ahead?
topStories.summary: South Korea's Kospi index saw a significant jump, recovering some losses after a sharp decline. Shares of chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix drove this recent market recovery. However, the index remains in a bear market, reflecting investor caution and wild swings. Authorities have intervened to cool speculative fever and curb leveraged trading. Analysts suggest foreign investor selloffs are moderating, with a neutral stance on the market.

topStories.title: Sensex falls over 50 points, Nifty below 24,250 despite Iran-US mediation efforts
topStories.summary: Indian stock markets saw marginal losses on Tuesday as Sensex and Nifty traded flat. Broader markets, however, opened with modest gains, bucking the overall trend. Mediation efforts between Iran and the US led to a dip in oil prices below $90 per barrel. Analysts suggest crude oil prices and banking sector earnings will guide market direction. Geopolitical developments and regional tensions remain key factors influencing market sentiment.

topStories.title: Political rivalries clash over Karnataka’s Bidadi township project
topStories.summary: The Bidadi township project envisages acquiring about 9,600 acres across 25 villages in the Bengaluru South district.

topStories.title: The Hindu Lit for Life Unplugged launches with Usha Uthup and Anand Puri at Kolkata’s Trincas
topStories.summary: From stories of Satyajit Ray, Sharmila Tagore, and Uttam Kumar to memories of Kolkata’s historic live music scene in the 1970s, singer Usha Uthup and historian Anand Puri brought Trincas’ remarkable history back to life at The Hindu’s Lit for Life Unplugged

topStories.title: Nvidia among 6 megacaps that Morningstar says are undervalued. See full list
topStories.summary: Morningstar sees six megacap stocks as undervalued opportunities.  Nvidia's AI GPU systems are expected to drive strong future growth.  Microsoft continues its dominance in productivity and public cloud markets.  Amazon's valuation is attractive, influencing the consumer cyclical sector.  Meta Platforms and AMD also show promising future demand.

topStories.title: U.K. PM Burnham names Reynolds as Business Minister, Rayner for housing
topStories.summary: Jonathan Reynolds was named ‌Secretary ⁠of State for ⁠Business, Innovation, Science and Trade in an expanded role ​after losing his ‌position as business Minister to Peter Kyle in a reshuffle under ‌former Prime Minister ​Keir Starmer

topStories.title: IndiGo shares in focus on MoU with CFM International for over 1,000 LEAP engines
topStories.summary: IndiGo has signed a significant MoU with CFM International for over 1,000 LEAP-1A engines. This agreement marks the largest single order ever placed for LEAP engines. CFM International will also support IndiGo's new engine maintenance facility. The airline's partnership with CFM International continues its growth phase. This deal strengthens IndiGo's expanding fleet and operational reliability.

topStories.title: Andy Burnham becomes U.K. PM, promising new social and political model
topStories.summary: ‘I go with good grace and a smile on my face’, says outgoing Prime Minister Keir Starmer says

topStories.title: Caliber Mining & Logistics IPO Day 3: GMP hints at 22% listing gain as issue draws robust investor interest
topStories.summary: Caliber Mining & Logistics' Rs 450-crore IPO is in its final bidding day. Investor demand remains strong, with the issue subscribed over 23 times. The grey market indicates a potential listing gain of nearly 22%. Proceeds will fund debt repayment and capital expenditure for machinery. The company expects its stock to debut on exchanges on July 24, 2026.

india.title: Quote of the day by David Beckham: "I have always believed that if you want to achieve anything special in life you have to…" - a powerful lesson on hard work, discipline and why talent alone is never enough
india.summary: David Beckham's quote highlights continuous hard work as essential for special achievements. He stressed that consistent effort, not just occasional bursts, builds lasting success. Talent provides a head start, but dedication often surpasses natural ability over time. Beckham's career, including overcoming setbacks, exemplifies this philosophy in action. Modern culture often portrays success as instant, but real achievements develop quietly through dedication.

tn.title: Bhaktavatsalam’s take on the destruction of documents relating to anti-Hindi agitation in Tamil Nadu
tn.summary: He said he was advised that papers on politicians against whom detention orders had been served need not be kept so that they would not be available to the very people who were likely to take charge of the government. When Ministers came to know about officers who had made reports about them, they would get prejudiced, he further said

tn.title: Meenambal Sivaraj: a trailblazer for Dalit rights and women empowerment
tn.summary: Meenambal Sivaraj was born on December 12, 1904, in Rangoon, in a family that placed great importance on education and service. One of her most significant contributions was her work with All India Scheduled Castes Federation founded by Ambedkar

tn.title: The 1995 caste reprisals that scarred southern T.N. also touched Communist leader Nallakannu’s life
tn.summary: On December 3, 1995, Nallakannu’s 84-year-old father-in-law, A.K. Annasamy, was murdered by a gang while he was asleep at his house in Marudanvalvu village, then part of Chidambaranar district (now Thoothukudi district)

trichy.summary: The bund of the canal, which is maintained by the Water Resources Department, is ideal to form the road and the government could even acquire private landholdings for the purpose, say activists

trichy.title: The Kumbakonam connection of MGR, M.K. Nambyar and M.S. Swaminathan
trichy.summary: The families of the iconic film star and former Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, the distinguished constitutional lawyer, and the celebrated agricultural scientist hailed from Kerala. But they spent a formative part of their lives in Kumbakonam, known for its rich cultural heritage, before rising to national prominence in politics, cinema, law, and science

trichy.title: An idol found near Gangaikonda Cholapuram confirms the ‘Thiruvarasu’ of Nathamunigal
trichy.summary: Near the Gangaikonda Cholapuram-Kumbakonam Road is a place called Sorgapallam or Sembodai where an idol of Srinivasa Perumal as once found half-buried under a tree. In the year 2000, another idol was found buried in a field. It was that of the first of the Sri Vaishnava Acharyas, who was said to have been at the place in his final hours

trichy.title: Thanjavur Big Temple inscriptions bring alive the fierce fight between Shivaji and Afzal Khan
trichy.summary: The inscriptions, written in Marathi on the south-western walls near the Vinayagar Temple, also describe the history of the Maratha kings and praise Danish missionary Rev. Friedrich Christian Schwartz. They also highlight how Serfoji sent his army and offered financial assistance to the British during the war against the Marudu brothers

trichy.title: J.C. Daniel, a Tamil dentist and martial artist, who became the father of Malayalam cinema
trichy.summary: Driven by his passion for cinema, Daniel sold his share of family property in Kanniyakumari district and borrowed money from friends and relatives to produce the first Malayalam silent film Vigathakumaran (The Lost Child). The film told the story of a child kidnapped by a plantation worker from Sri Lanka and later reunited with his family

trichy.title: Collection of names of animals as portrayed in Tamil classics
trichy.summary: The ancient Tamils employed a remarkable richness of vocabulary to refer to animals. H. Chithiraputhiran, a former professor at Tamil University, Thanjavur, has compiled a specialised dictionary of animals in classical literature to recover these words

trichy.title: Goddess Saraswati without veena: Sculptures of Pallava, Chola eras reveal an earlier iconography
trichy.summary: The veena, today regarded as inseparable from Saraswati’s identity, appears to have emerged as her dominant symbol only in the later period.

business.title: SBI Funds Management IPO: Shares list at 7% premium, but target prices go up to Rs 750. Time to buy?
business.summary: SBI Funds Management debuted with a nearly 7% premium over its IPO price, falling short of grey market expectations. Despite this, brokerages remain bullish, with Emkay assigning a Rs 750 target price and Equirus Rs 675, while analysts advise long-term investors to hold the stock on strong fundamentals.

business.title: Jaiprakash Power shares surge 8% after Q1 profit jumps 69%, revenue rises 12% YoY
business.summary: Jaiprakash Power shares rallied 8.4% after strong Q1FY27 results, with revenue rising 12.2% and profit surging 68.6% year-on-year. The company returned to sequential profitability, while increased institutional holdings and positive technical momentum further supported investor sentiment.

business.title: ICICI Bank wins analysts’ vote after Q1 show; HDFC Bank, Axis, Kotak & Yes Bank face scrutiny
business.summary: ICICI Bank shares rose after reporting strong June quarter earnings and improved financial metrics. Other major private lenders like HDFC Bank and Axis Bank saw their stock prices decline. Analysts favored ICICI Bank for its consistent performance and clean results this quarter. Kotak Mahindra Bank also received a buy recommendation with a watchful eye on leadership. Investors are advised to consider their risk appetite when choosing among these banking stocks.

business.title: Dixon Tech shares down 30% from 52-week high. Can these 3 triggers reignite the rally for 79 lakh shareholder
business.summary: Dixon Technologies shares may see a rally after recent declines from their peak. Government approval for the Vivo joint venture is a significant development for smartphone manufacturing. New policy support for electronics manufacturing aims to boost domestic production and global competitiveness. Expanded customs duty exemptions are expected to lower input costs for the company. These combined factors strengthen Dixon's growth outlook and shareholder value.

business.title: Global Market:  Japan's Nikkei rebounds as bargain buying lifts stocks after sharp weekly selloff
business.summary: Japan's Nikkei share average advanced on Tuesday, recovering from last week's steep slide. Investors bought beaten-down stocks after a market holiday, boosting the index. Global sentiment remained cautious due to rising oil prices and inflation concerns. Focus now shifts to upcoming second-quarter earnings from major U.S. technology firms. Analysts noted the gains reflected a technical rebound ahead of key corporate results.

business.title: Cause for concern? HDFC Bank is lagging ICICI Bank where it matters as investors count Rs 5 lakh crore loss
business.summary: HDFC Bank's stock has declined significantly this year, losing considerable investor value. Analysts note a widening operating gap between HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank. Margins are under pressure for HDFC Bank, while loan growth lags peers. ICICI Bank shows stronger earnings, better margins, and faster credit growth. Investors await margin recovery and management stability for HDFC Bank.

business.title: UltraTech Cement shares gain 2% after Q1 results. Why Nuvama, other brokerages raised target?
business.summary: UltraTech Cement shares rose after the company posted a 17% year-on-year rise in Q1 FY27 consolidated net profit to Rs 2,599 crore and a 16% increase in revenue to Rs 24,648 crore. The stock also gained after multiple brokerages raised their target prices, encouraged by strong earnings and management guidance

business.title: Paytm shares gain 3% after Q1 results. What are Goldman Sachs, Citi and CLSA saying?
business.summary: Paytm shares rose 2.7% after the fintech firm reported a 79% year-on-year jump in Q1 consolidated net profit to Rs 220 crore. Revenue from operations increased 28% to Rs 2,448 crore, while total income rose 22% to Rs 2,630 crore. Profit before tax climbed to Rs 247 crore, reflecting stronger operating performance both year-on-year and quarter-on-quarter.

business.title: South Korea’s Kospi jumps 4% after 31% crash from June peak. What’s ahead?
business.summary: South Korea's Kospi index saw a significant jump, recovering some losses after a sharp decline. Shares of chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix drove this recent market recovery. However, the index remains in a bear market, reflecting investor caution and wild swings. Authorities have intervened to cool speculative fever and curb leveraged trading. Analysts suggest foreign investor selloffs are moderating, with a neutral stance on the market.

business.title: Sensex falls over 50 points, Nifty below 24,250 despite Iran-US mediation efforts
business.summary: Indian stock markets saw marginal losses on Tuesday as Sensex and Nifty traded flat. Broader markets, however, opened with modest gains, bucking the overall trend. Mediation efforts between Iran and the US led to a dip in oil prices below $90 per barrel. Analysts suggest crude oil prices and banking sector earnings will guide market direction. Geopolitical developments and regional tensions remain key factors influencing market sentiment.

business.title: IndiGo shares in focus on MoU with CFM International for over 1,000 LEAP engines

CFM International will also support IndiGo's new engine maintenance facility. The airline's partnership with CFM International continues its growth phase. This deal strengthens IndiGo's expanding fleet and operational reliability.

business.title: Caliber Mining & Logistics IPO Day 3: GMP hints at 22% listing gain as issue draws robust investor interest

The grey market indicates a potential listing gain of nearly 22%. Proceeds will fund debt repayment and capital expenditure for machinery. The company expects its stock to debut on exchanges on July 24, 2026.

business.title: Paytm calls off its first-ever bonus issue proposal. Here’s what management said

business.title: SBI Funds IPO jackpot turns 13 employees into crorepatis; top ESOP haul hits Rs 121 crore
business.summary: SBI Funds IPO has transformed thirteen employees into crorepatis through stock ownership. Deputy Managing Director Devinder Pal Singh received the largest payout valued at Rs 121 crore. Chief Investment Officer Srinivasan Rama Iyer also secured a stake worth approximately Rs 105 crore. Several other senior executives gained substantial wealth from the company's successful public offering. This wealth creation highlights the significant payoff from SBI Funds' employee stock ownership program.

business.title: Alpine Texworld shares list flat at IPO price of Rs 105 on BSE, NSE
business.summary: Alpine Texworld shares debuted flat on Tuesday at their IPO price of Rs 105.  The company plans to use Rs 126.25 crore raised from the IPO for expansion.  Funds will support a new weaving unit and debt reduction efforts.  Alpine Texworld specializes in fabric dyeing and processing with two existing facilities.  The company is also investing in renewable energy for sustainable growth.

business.title: ETMarkets Smart Talk | Power, electricals and cooling could be biggest winners of India’s $25 billion data-centre boom: Atul Suri
business.summary: India's data-centre expansion will drive significant investment in physical infrastructure. Power equipment and electricals are poised to benefit from this build-out. Cooling infrastructure and electronics manufacturing services also present key opportunities. This shift favors physical builders over traditional technology service providers. Investors should focus on strength and discipline amid this market rotation.

business.title: Premier Energies among 5 stocks closed above VWAP, signalling bullish shift

Trading above the VWAP is widely regarded as a bullish technical signal, reflecting strong buying interest and indicating the potential for further upside.

business.title: Union Bank of India among 7 stocks flashing bullish signals, hinting at a possible uptrend
